transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bridgeway Health Navigation, this is Adele. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, my doctor said she'd send a referral to a dermatologist, but I never heard anything back. It's been two weeks.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry for the delay. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Marcus Feld, born March 3rd, 1985.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. I see the referral from Dr. Ainsley to Dr. Priya Ranjan at Cedarbrook Dermatology, submitted on the 2nd. It's still showing as pending authorization.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: So what do I do now? I have a rash that's not going away.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can escalate this for expedited review since it's a symptomatic case. I'll flag it urgent right now.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That would be great, thank you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Done. You should get authorization confirmation within 24 to 48 hours, and Cedarbrook will call to schedule. I'll also text you their direct line in case you want to call sooner.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Anything else I can help with today, Marcus?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Thanks for sorting this out.
